title: Leashable To
description: Allows players to leash entities to this entity, retrieve those already leashed to it, or free them using shears.

can_retrieve_from.title: Can Retrieve From
can_retrieve_from.description: Allows players to retrieve entities that are leashed to this entity.

unleash_on_removal.title: Unleash On Removal
unleash_on_removal.description: If true, the entity is unleashed when the component is removed.
